ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* List of training programs completed by the employee */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee taking the assessment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timing of the assessment (e.g., pre, post) */,
  "confidence_managing_data" TEXT /* Confidence level in managing data */,
  "quickly_find_data" TEXT /* Ability to quickly find data */,
  "comfortable_with_colleagues" TEXT /* Comfort level in collaborating with colleagues */,
  "best_practices" TEXT /* Agreement on best practices */,
  "training_intervention" TEXT /* Details of any training interventions that occurred before the assessment */,
  "assessor" TEXT /* The person or system conducting the assessment */,
  "feedback_provided" INTEGER /* Whether the employee provided feedback after the assessment */,
  "improvement_plan" TEXT /* Any improvement plan proposed based on the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee providing feedback */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment the feedback is related to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Written comments regarding the assessment or experiences */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement or changes in the process */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score representing the sentiment of the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location or office of the department */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "onboarding" (
  "onboarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each onboarding entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee providing feedback on onboarding */,
  "onboarding_date" TEXT /* Date the onboarding process started */,
  "onboarding_program" TEXT /* Specific onboarding program used */,
  "onboarding_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the onboarding process in days */,
  "onboarding_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the onboarding process */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Employee's experience level with the onboarding process */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improving the onboarding experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("onboarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_onboarding_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
